message:
refactor(core): simplify survival model_run_and_shutdown test to use std::thread and update guardrails

Replace the async run_async_test helper with a direct std::thread::spawn
approach that builds its own runtime inline, removing the shared helper
which depended on runtime compat task spawning machinery.

Update asupersync guardrails doc with current forbidden token ceilings
(tokio 1302->281, smol 83->53, async_io 3->10) and newly tracked
dependency locations in mux-server-impl, client, and lua-api-crates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
